roa.docketEntryComment: MOT TO CORRECT CUSTODY CREDITS FILED

/CAL MOT TO CORRECT CUSTODY CREDITS/X BASED ON SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT BY APDTHE COURT MODIFIED DEFENDANT'S SENTENCE AS FOLLOWS /X DEFENDANT TO RECEIE CREDIT FOR 484 ACTUAL DAYS PLUS 242 DAYS SAGE CREDITS FOR A TOTAL TIMEEDIT OF 726 DAYS/X THE COURT ORDERED THAT AN AMENDED ABSTRACT BE FORWARDETO CALIFORNIA DEPT, OF CORRECTIONS/

/CAL:DA MTR HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH PX HRG IN #2246911/X:COURT FIND BASEDON PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DEFT IS IN WILLFUL VIOLATION OF PROBATION,/X:COURT FINDS DEFT NOT AMENABLE TO PROBATION THEREFORE PROBATION ISREVOKED,/CONTD:FOR SENTENCING/X:ALSO PRESENT IN COURT FOR DEF IS FRED REMER,/08    PSUPP RPT ON DA MTR/DA-MTR/SUPP:10-31-06/PROB REV/NB/CTORD:SUPPLRPT TO BE RETURNED TO DEPT 20 BEFORE HON S BREALL ON OCTOBER 31, 200630 AM/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/

/CAL:MOT TO WITHDRAW PLEA/CONTD:MOT TO WITHDRAW PLEA AND MOTION TO REVOKE//X:DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY OF RECORD WHEN PLEA WAS ENTERED ON 06-13-05, MR, FRED REMER, WAS CONTACTED BY PHONE AND ADVISED RE NEXT HEARING DATE/
/CAL MOTION TO CORRECT CUSTODY CREDITS/NP/X DEFENDANT IS IN STATE PRISON//CTSCAL/PRES 06-19-07/
CONTD TS DA MTR/S20/TBH:2246911 CONCURRENTLY/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/X:CONT'DFROM 08-18-06/
/CAL:TO SET FR D11/09    DTS DA MTR/S20/X:TBH CONCURRENTLY WITH PX HRG IN #2246911/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/
/CAL:TS DA MTR/CONTD:MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/DOP/ /CONTD:TO BE HEARD WITH#2246911/
CONTD TS DA MTR/NP/WIAMTR/S22/TBH:2246911/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/DISM3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:07-05-05/
CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
